query: Find unclassified sensitive columns and any lineage upstreams that are missing from the catalog
expected_behavior: Harvests dataset schema fields read-only (get_entities / list_schema_fields for wide schemas)
Flags G6 findings: schema fields whose path matches the sensitivity list but carry no tag or glossary term, listing the columns
Reads get_lineage upstream for each dataset and builds the set of catalogued URNs
Flags L1 findings: declared upstream URNs that are not in the catalogued set (unreachable/dangling lineage edges), naming the missing upstream
Ranks findings high -> low and attaches a steward-facing recommendation to each
Stays read-only and reminds the user a steward dispositions; suggests /datahub-enrich to apply fixes
